candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line exists above financial items, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales-related and appears alongside broader operating expense components rather than specifically within the selected COGS bucket 'Reimbursable Expenses'. Adding it to COGS would risk misclassification/double counting.

Component/detail of the D&A disclosure, not clearly tied to the selected COGS bucket 'Reimbursable Expenses'. Also inferior to the summary row 'Depreciation and amortization' if a D&A row were to be chosen.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Reimbursable Expenses'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines but are not explicitly COGS-related, so they should not be added to COGS absent clearer attribution.

candidates.why: This appears as a separate operating line item under/alongside 'Operating Expenses'. Because the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket already includes 'Operating Expenses', this D&A line appears to be embedded in that selected parent bucket and should not be added separately.
Detail/component of the D&A disclosure. Since 'Operating Expenses' is already selected and this looks like a component beneath that parent, adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket includes 'Operating Expenses', which appears to be the parent operating-expense total containing the separate D&A line items shown beneath it. Therefore no separate XSGA D&A should be added.
